{{Infobox
|image_url=https://raw.githubusercontent.com/PixelGuys/Cubyz/refs/tags/0.2.0/assets/cubyz/blocks/textures/iron_block.png
|block_health=50
|block_resistance=7
|tool=[[Pickaxe]]
|rotation=stairs
}}


== Obtaining ==
Iron blocks can be crafted from 4 [[Iron Ingot|iron ingots]].

== Usage ==
Iron blocks can be crafted back into 4 [[Iron Ingot|iron ingots]].

== History ==

* [[0.0.0]] - Added to the game

== Trivia ==
{{Stub|section}}

[[Category:Blocks]]
[[Category:Metal Blocks]]
